feature.name: Decision Briefs
feature.factualDescription: Decision Briefs groups related customer evidence into a reviewable summary with linked source signals.

brand.name: Northstar Labs
brand.tagline: From scattered signals to one clear next move.

captions.text: Roadmap decisions need more than a loud request.
They need evidence your whole team can review.
Every summary stays linked to its source.
See themes, affected accounts, and impact.
Review the evidence before priorities change.
Move from backlog debate to a clear next step.

scenes.headline: A request is not a decision.
scenes.body: Strong priorities begin with evidence the whole team can inspect.
scenes.narration: Roadmap decisions need more than a loud request. They need evidence your whole team can review.

scenes.headline: Meet Decision Briefs.
scenes.body: A focused, reviewable summary for every important customer theme.
scenes.narration: Introducing Decision Briefs in Pulseboard, a focused summary for every important customer theme.

scenes.headline: Evidence gathers together.
scenes.body: Related requests, calls, and support themes become one coherent view.
scenes.narration: Related customer signals gather automatically into one coherent view.

scenes.headline: Keep every source in reach.
scenes.body: Summaries remain linked to the customer evidence behind them.
scenes.narration: Every summary stays linked to its source, so context is never hidden.

scenes.headline: See what the pattern means.
scenes.body: Understand recurring themes, affected accounts, and potential impact.
scenes.narration: See recurring themes, affected accounts, and potential impact in one place.

scenes.headline: Inspect before you prioritize.
scenes.body: Give product leaders a clear evidence trail before the roadmap changes.
scenes.narration: Review the evidence before priorities change, with a clear trail for product leaders.

scenes.headline: Align around customer truth.
scenes.body: Share the same decision-ready brief across product, success, and sales.
scenes.narration: Share one decision-ready customer narrative across product, success, and sales.

scenes.headline: Make the next step clear.
scenes.body: Turn scattered feedback into a grounded direction the team understands.
scenes.narration: Move from backlog debate to a clear next step grounded in customer evidence.

scenes.headline: Clarity creates momentum.
scenes.body: Spend less time reconstructing context and more time acting on it.
scenes.narration: Spend less time reconstructing context and more time acting on it.

scenes.headline: Explore Decision Briefs.
scenes.body: Bring reviewable evidence to your next product decision.
scenes.narration: Explore Decision Briefs at Pulseboard dot example and bring reviewable evidence to your next product decision.
